flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St. Thomas University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at St. Thomas University rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 2.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at St. Thomas University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (41.2% → 48.1%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at St. Thomas University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (33.5% → 37.4%).
